rationale.R1.5: The agent reorganized the abstract into a clear problem-method-result-contribution structure, tightening the framing and sharpening claim language to match evidence. However, they did not propose a full end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged points they could not verify but did not mark confidence for each recommendation, partially addressing uncertainty disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope with only minor drifts, maintaining focus on the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text without introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
